# Workflow scripts — generated by Keel

These scripts are generated by Keel into `.claude/workflows/` alongside the project docs.
Each phase has a dedicated workflow script that fans out divisible work as parallel agents
in separate `git worktree`s, runs a mandatory doc-sync step, then merges.

## Usage

Run a phase script:
```
# via Claude Code CLI
claude --workflow .claude/workflows/phase-N-<slug>.js

# or paste the path into the Workflow tool inside a Claude Code session
```

Run a standalone doc sync (before any manual merge):
```
claude --workflow .claude/workflows/doc-sync.js
```

## Scripts in this project

| Script | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `doc-sync.js` | Mandatory pre-merge doc sync — run after every unit of work |
| `phase-0-guardrails.js` | Phase 0: scaffold guardrails and CI |
| `phase-N-<slug>.js` | One script per IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN phase |

## Rules

- Never merge to trunk without a doc-sync commit.
- Never share a worktree between agents — one task, one worktree.
- Deferred items must state WHY and WHEN, not just WHAT.
- Decisions captured in ADR.md before merge, not after.
